category_sources: source_facts.description says it watches files or folders and automatically commits changes to a Git repo; official GitHub README describes the same workflow.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gitwatch; official repository name is gitwatch/gitwatch.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/gitwatch/gitwatch, so repo is not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies watching paths and automatic Git commits; source_facts.executables lists gitwatch CLI; official GitHub README documents automatic commits.
